response.text:
```json { "description": "A versatile container for grouping related content with customizable visual emphasis.", "semanticDescription": "The Card component serves as a flexible container to group related content and actions, visually distinguishing them from the surrounding layout. It provides options for various levels of visual emphasis through its `elevation` prop, allowing it to appear `default`, `raised`, or `flat`. This component is fundamental for organizing information into distinct, digestible blocks within an application's user interface, enhancing readability and visual hierarchy.", "tier": "free", "whenToUse": "Use Card to group related content or actions, such as user profiles, product listings, or news articles. It's ideal for breaking down complex UIs into digestible sections, making content easier to scan and understand. Employ different `elevation` levels to convey hierarchy or interactivity within your application.", "whenNotToUse": "Avoid using Card for purely decorative purposes or when a simpler container like a `Box` or `div` would suffice without the need for visual separation or elevation. Do not use Cards as a substitute for semantic HTML elements like `article` or `section` unless it aligns with the component's styling and interaction needs.", "patterns": ["container", "data-display", "layout", "composition"], "tokens": ["color-background-surface", "spacing-md", "border-radius-sm", "shadow-sm"], "examples": [ "This is a default card with some content.", "This card has a raised appearance, often used for interactive or primary elements.", "This card has a flat appearance, blending more with the background.", "

Product Title

Description of the product.

" ], "relatedComponents": ["Box", "Button", "Text", "Image"], "a11yNotes": "Ensure the content within the Card maintains a logical reading order. If the Card itself is interactive (e.g., a clickable link or button), ensure it is focusable and has an appropriate ARIA role (e.g., `role=\"link\"`, `role=\"button\"`) and an accessible name. For purely visual grouping, no specific ARIA roles are usually required for the Card element itself." } ```

promptSummary:
